data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Fall After Latest Spike; Broadcom, Nvidia In Focus
data.description: Both the Dow Jones and Russell 2000 indexes continue to decline while crude oil prices reach their peak since July 2024. However, there is a positive turn with Dow Jones futures seeing an increase and oil prices showing a fall following the recent spike. Investors are closely watching companies like Broadcom and Nvidia amidst these fluctuations in the market.
Hang Seng Tech Index Rises Close to 3% Amid Hong Kong Market Gains

data.title: DMG Blockchain Solutions Announces 75 MW Utility Approval Expanding Christina Lake Data Center Power, February Preliminary Operational Results
data.description: DMG Blockchain Solutions has received approval for a 75-megawatt (MW) utility to enhance the power capacity of their Christina Lake Data Center. The company has also released their preliminary operational results for February.

data.title: Dyna.Ai Leads the Global Transition to Agentic AI at MWC 2026 by Delivering Accountable Business Outcomes
data.description: The recent conclusion of MWC Barcelona 2026 emphasized a notable transition in the global technology sector. The industry is moving from conversational AI to Agentic AI, which are systems designed for execution and demonstrating a positive return on investment. This shift was evident at the event, with significant emphasis on Agentic AI’s potential.

data.title: OKX launches Orbit, a social platform linking posts to trades. Traders can share portfolio and earn rewards for follower engagement.
data.description: In a move hailed for its transparency, Orbit is offering traders the opportunity to share their portfolio data and receive rewards based on the engagement of their followers. This initiative by OKX is aimed at promoting openness in the trading community.
